prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, using 100000 Monte Carlo simulations. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for PG over the last 2 years were used to estimate the annualized drift (approximately 0.0887) and volatility (approximately 0.1432). These parameters were then applied to project the stock price 6 trading days into the future. The point estimate is the median of the simulated prices, and confidence intervals are derived from the percentiles of the simulated distribution.
